prestazioni: Engine: 831A5.000 (2.0L 16V turbocharged inline-4) with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) running 1.5 bar of boost with a custom 44mm external wastegate setup by Turbosmart. Fuel system upgraded with Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, and a custom Motec M150 ECU managing sequential fueling and ignition timing with a 24-tooth crank trigger wheel for precise knock control.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD in the front differential (replacing the stock Torsen) paired with a 2.5-way Cusco Type-RS limited-slip differential in the rear, mated to a reinforced Lancia Delta Integrale Evo II gearbox with close-ratio gears (1st: 3.50, 2nd: 2.23, 3rd: 1.52, 4th: 1.15, 5th: 0.92) and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch with cerametallic friction material. Driveshafts upgraded to GKN Lobro CV joints with reinforced boots and a custom aluminum prop shaft.

Suspension & Chassis: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 400lb/in front springs and 350lb/in rear springs, adjustable camber plates, and spherical bearing top mounts. Full polybush kit from SuperPro (part numbers SPF0115K, SPF0116K, SPF0117K) replacing all control arm, subframe, and trailing arm bushings. Front strut brace by Sabelt (Delta HF Integrale-specific) and a custom 3-point rear strut brace fabricated from 4130 chromoly. Braking system features Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm rotors) up front and 4-piston calipers (330mm rotors) in the rear, with Ferodo DS2500 pads and braided stainless steel lines from Goodridge.
estetica: Bodywork: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a Delta HF Integrale-specific Rocket Bunny/Pandem kit (PANDEM-001), including extended front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom 3-piece carbon fiber rear wing with adjustable Gurney flaps. Front bumper modified with a custom splitter from APR Performance (integrating a 30mm dive plane) and a carbon fiber hood with a functional NACA duct feeding the Garrett turbocharger. Rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon with integrated exhaust cutouts for a custom 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system by Akrapovic (Ti-Evo line).

Wheels & Tires: OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels in 9x17 ET15 front and 10x17 ET15 rear, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (235/40/17 front, 265/35/17 rear). Custom center-lock adapters by Wavetrac for quick wheel changes, with titanium wheel bolts from ARP. Fender flares rolled and pulled for maximum clearance, with custom aluminum fender liners to protect the engine bay.

Interior: Full Recaro Pole Position seats (Evo II-spec) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, mounted to a custom bolt-in roll cage by Safety Devices (SD0383) with integrated harness bars. Dashboard and door cards reupholstered in Alcantara with red stitching, featuring a custom Motec C127 digital dash replacing the stock cluster. Steering wheel upgraded to a Momo Prototipo (350mm) with a quick-release hub, and the shift knob replaced with a weighted titanium unit from CAE (Delta Integrale-specific pattern).
